pattern: Tokenizing on whitespace and reassembling with case rules turns free text into a single camelCase identifier under a length cap.
hints: Split the caption into words and treat the first word differently from the rest.
Lowercase every word entirely, then uppercase only the first character of each word after the first.
Join the transformed words, prepend '#', and cut the whole result down to at most 100 characters.

edge_inputs.description: leading and multiple spaces produce empty tokens to drop
first character of first word stays lowercase even if originally upper
long single word must be truncated to 100
only spaces yields just the hash

stress.description: random words of varied length and case to stress tokenizing and truncation
stress.note: letters and spaces only, matching the stated alphabet
